summary: Frontend testing for VELA Critical Data Consistency Fix + Final Aesthetic Refinement. ALL 7 priority test areas PASSED including the highest-priority data consistency check between Portfolio rows and Dashboard unrealized-uplift, deterministic intelligence values across reloads, Intelligence Profile strip on Dashboard, per-row confidence badge on Portfolio, Landing emotional arc ordering, regression of Dashboard moat sections, and /visualize/demo/0 strategic concepts.

data_consistency_verification.verdict: PASS — Portfolio row uplifts equal the sum of revenue_impact line items from /api/portfolio/demo for all 5 properties. Dashboard /dashboard/demo unrealized-uplift = €8,900 = Portfolio Cycladic row. Single canonical computePropertyIntelligence is the source of truth.
data_consistency_verification.non_demo_dashboard_note: Non-demo dashboards (/dashboard/{property_id}) redirect to /login — expected per task instructions. Equivalence verified indirectly via Portfolio rows matching backend ground truth.

intelligence_profile_strip.intel_date: APR 2026 ✓ (matches Portfolio row date for same property)

landing_emotional_arc.hero_title_text_match: Hospitality assets are leaving revenue on the table. ✓
landing_emotional_arc.ctas: hero-cta-analyze, hero-cta-demo, cta-analyze-bottom, cta-demo-bottom — all 4 render and clickable (analyze CTA correctly routes auth-gated to /login)

determinism_test.details: Reloaded /dashboard/demo twice — intel-version, intel-date, intel-confidence, intel-coverage, unrealized-uplift were ALL IDENTICAL across loads. _stableTimestamp from hash(property_id|name|city) producing stable date. No per-render volatility.

visualize_regression.verdict: PASS — all 3 rec-aware Sleep-family keys render correctly

backend_sanity.api_portfolio_demo: Returns 5 properties with correct yield_opportunities sums
backend_sanity.api_visualize_post: Endpoint exists; 422 returned without `recommendation` field (Pydantic validation working as expected)

critical_code_review_comments: intelligence.js is well-designed: deterministic hash, no randomness, single source of truth pattern correctly implemented.
Dashboard.jsx UnrealizedRevenue and IntelligenceProfileStrip both correctly delegate to computePropertyIntelligence(property) — no local recompute drift detected.
Non-demo /dashboard/{id} routes are auth-gated; this is expected. The data consistency contract is preserved by the canonical compute fn shared with Portfolio (which is public).

_stableTimestamp uses Date.now() minus daysAgo — this means the absolute timestamp drifts across calendar boundaries (e.g., test ran in May 2026 might show Apr/Mar 2026 depending on hash). Acceptable for current spec but worth noting if exact date pinning is required.
test_credentials: No login required — all tested routes are public demo
context_for_next_testing_agent: All VELA data consistency contracts verified. Portfolio rows for the 5 demo property_ids show uplift values that EXACTLY match the sum of revenue_impact line items in /api/portfolio/demo, and /dashboard/demo unrealized-uplift matches the Cycladic Portfolio row. computePropertyIntelligence is deterministic across reloads. Landing emotional arc all 6 sections render in correct order. No frontend or backend regressions detected.
